size.note: majority is the new test file + docstrings; single logical concern

architecture.note: canonical write routed through EntityRepository port (correct dependency direction); reuses central_tenant_home + LocalFileEntityAdapter (ADR-005 reuse); graceful degradation preserved; no new untimed external call (local FS)

security.note: no secrets/injection/eval/shell; degradation log interpolates only target_path (non-sensitive); x-sensitive source field carried opaque, not logged

quality.cr10_perf: no anti-pattern matches (the _save_canonical loop iterates the composed Projects (N=1 per mint), each a distinct entity save — not an N+1 query-in-loop)
quality.test_coverage: comprehensive: new test_minter_reconcile.py (10 tests) + characterisation baseline preserved + e2e updated
quality.contract_drift: branch_policy 'trunk-based' was pre-existing drift (impl emitted a non-schema enum value); THIS WP fixes it via _compose_entity default + canonical normalisation
